core_beliefs.belief: 通信根本问题——复制消息
core_beliefs.source: The fundamental problem of communication is that of reproducing at one point either exactly or approximately a message selected at another point
core_beliefs.explanation: 香农对通信问题的精确定义,信息论的开篇

core_beliefs.belief: bit 概念——信息的最小单位
core_beliefs.explanation: bit 是数字时代的基石,信息熵的载体

core_beliefs.source: 1948 论文 H(X) = -Σ p(x) log p(x)
core_beliefs.explanation: 信息熵是香农的核心数学工具

core_beliefs.belief: 一次性密码本不可破译
core_beliefs.source: the cryptographic one-time pad is unbreakable (1945)
core_beliefs.explanation: 1945 香农证明一次性密码本的理论不可破

core_beliefs.source: 1937 硕士论文(继电器与开关电路的符号分析)
core_beliefs.explanation: 1937 硕士论文将布尔代数应用于电气工程,数字电路基础

core_beliefs.belief: AI 奠基——这些斯鼠与达特茅斯
core_beliefs.source: Theseus 迷宫鼠(1950);达特茅斯会议(1956)
core_beliefs.explanation: 香农是 AI 奠基人之一,忒修斯鼠与达特茅斯会议

core_beliefs.source: I just wondered how things were put together
